57589.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57589.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57590.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57590.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57591.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
57591.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

57592.title: Forever 80s
57592.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

57593.title: 50 Unforgettable 80s Music Videos!
57593.description: The golden era of music videos... And we were there! Here are some of the best 80s music videos that we will never forget!

57594.title: ... So 80s!
57594.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
